result:
The R script has been successfully executed. The cleaned dataset containing the educational qualification variables (NSID, educ25, educ32, educadtl32, educvdtl32) has been created and saved to data/output/cleaned_data.csv. The script properly handles all the requirements including:

1. Loading all input files from data/input/ directory
2. Merging datasets using full_join by NSID
3. Deriving educ25 from both academic (W8DHANVQH) and vocational (W8VCQU*) sources
4. Deriving educ32 from academic (W9DANVQH) and vocational (W9DVNVQH) sources
5. Creating detailed academic (educadtl32) and vocational (educvdtl32) qualification variables
6. Properly handling missing values and preserving standard missing codes
7. Outputting the final cleaned dataset to data/output/cleaned_data.csv
